title: Jamaican Beef Hash
description: A spicy twist on the classic breakfast dish, featuring jamaican seasoning and crumbly beef.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the Jamaican seasoning, white onion, cabbage, and hash brown potatoes to the skillet. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese on top of the mixture.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
